Issues: Lack of Unique Artistic Style: The image presents a very generic, high-contrast, minimalist cityscape. While technically well-rendered, it lacks a unique artistic signature or specific aesthetic niche that would make it stand out in a crowded market.
High Competition: This type of architectural concept is widely available. Without unique composition, lighting, or a specific mood, it is highly competitive when selling stock imagery or prints.

Low Specific Commercial Appeal: The image serves as a good generic background, but it doesn't offer a specific, high-demand theme (e.g., cyberpunk, brutalism, specific city type) that would guarantee sales compared to highly stylized or narrative images.
